name: ms-precision-trap
notes: Timestamp drops millisecond precision (.000Z -> Z). Semantically identical time, but JCS treats strings as opaque bytes. Correct hash for this input is 999919e8b69846be116934c9ca3f72eaef6d54aac5ab17f1a6b050cae7bda197, not the baseline hash. Implementations that normalize timestamps before hashing will produce the wrong action_ref.
